title: Product Tagline
scenario: Create a short tagline for a new eco-friendly cleaning product. The tagline should include the product name, the key benefit, and a call-to-action.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated tagline meets the word count and word inclusion criteria.
Assess if the tagline accurately represents the product and its benefits.
Evaluate if the tagline has a friendly, persuasive tone.
